progress.unreviewedCourseGrade.alt: Information icon for unreviewed course grade
progress.unreviewedCourseGrade.label: Your current course grade includes proctored exams that are awaiting review. Your grade will be updated after the reviews are completed.
progress.unreviewedExamScore.alt: Information icon indicating pending exam review
progress.unreviewedExamScore.infoText: Your proctored exam is currently awaiting review. Your final score is pending and may change after review.
